parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "account_id": {{ $json.id ? '"' + $json.id + '"' : 'null' }},
  "video_id": "{{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.video_id }}",
  "video_url": "{{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.video_url }}",
  "title": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.title || '') }},
  "description_as_script": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.description_as_script || '') }},
  "hook_text": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.hook_text || '') }},
  "content_topic": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.content_topic || '') }},
  "is_timeless": {{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.is_timeless === true ? 'true' : 'false' }},
  "tech_stack": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.tech_stack || []) }},
  "narrative_structure": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.narrative_structure || {}) }},
  "why_it_worked": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.why_it_worked || '') }},
  "reel_adaptation": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.reel_adaptation || '') }},
  "youtube_channel_fit": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.youtube_channel_fit || '') }},
  "relevance_score": {{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.relevance_score || 0 }},
  "likes": {{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.likes || 0 }},
  "comments": {{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.comments || 0 }},
  "views": {{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.views || 0 }},
  "engagement_score": {{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.engagement_score || 0 }},
  "published_at": {{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.published_at ? '"' + $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.published_at + '"' : 'null' }},
  "analyzed_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
}
